title: Yijing Hexagram 19: Lin (Approach)
description: Hexagram 19 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 19 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Approach has supreme success. Perseverance furthers. When the eighth month comes, there will be misfortune.
